name: TEST - Header Tax Not Equal to Sum of Line Taxes and Charges (CIB)
trigger_condition:
(
  not is_empty(field.amount_total_tax_calculated)
  and not is_empty(field.charges_total_tax_calculated)
  and round(field.amount_total_tax_calculated, 2) != round(
    sum([default_to(v, 0) for v in field.item_tax_calculated.all_values])
    + field.charges_total_tax_calculated,
    2
  )
)

payload.content: The tax amount calculated on the header does not match the sum of taxes on the Line Items.
The tax amount calculated on the header does not match the sum of taxes on the Line Items.
